'''thalava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arabinofuranohydrolase|arabinofuranohydrolase]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arabinofuranohydrolase|arabinofuranohydrolase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thalava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thælævæth || thælævæj || thælævæsh || thælævæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thalalavath || thalalavaj || thalalavash || thalalava
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thalavath || thalavaj || thalavash || thalava
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thalafvafth || thalafvafj || thalafvafsh || thalafvaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || thalavatha || thalavaja || thalavasha || thalavaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || thalavath || thalavaj || thalavash || thalava
|-
| [[Possessive]] || thalavathal || thalavajal || thalavashal || thalavakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || thalavaathatha || thalavaajaja || thalavaashasha || thalavaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || thalavathan || thalavajan || thalavashan || thalavakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || thalavathaoro || thalavajaoro || thalavashaoro || thalavakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
